description: Binary assertions for semantic-architect tech spec output quality

assertions.description: Output file exists in docs/semantic/tech/
Filename matches CODE_01_Name.md pattern (2-5 uppercase, _, 2-digit number, _, PascalCase)
No freeform filenames (kebab-case, snake_case without code prefix, or single-word)
YAML frontmatter block exists (file starts with ---)
Frontmatter has type: tech_spec
Frontmatter has feature_id field matching the requested code
Frontmatter has feature_name field (non-empty string)
Frontmatter has module field (non-empty string)
Frontmatter has related_files as a list with at least 1 entry
Frontmatter has last_updated in YYYY-MM-DD format
Frontmatter has logic_id_count as integer > 0
Has ## Developer Summary section
assertions.heading: ## Developer Summary

assertions.description: Has ## Logic-to-Code Mapping section
assertions.heading: ## Logic-to-Code Mapping

assertions.description: Logic-to-Code section has a markdown table with | separators (at least 3 data rows)
Logic IDs in table follow FEAT-L# pattern (e.g., ASGN-L1, HDAY-L3)
Has ## Code Structure section
assertions.heading: ## Code Structure

assertions.description: Has ## Dependencies section
assertions.heading: ## Dependencies

assertions.description: Has ## Access Control section
assertions.heading: ## Access Control

assertions.description: Has ## Related Features section
assertions.heading: ## Related Features

assertions.description: logic_id_count in frontmatter matches actual count of FEAT-L# rows in the table
At least 50% of related_files paths reference files that exist in the project
feature_id in frontmatter matches the CODE prefix of the filename
Has a mermaid diagram (```mermaid code block)
Developer Summary is between 50 and 500 words
H1 title matches pattern FEAT_01: Feature Name
